files.name: RM26-4-000 - EEI Comments on DOE Large Load ANOPR (FINAL 11.21.25).pdf
files.path: sources/comments/files/20251121-5301/RM26-4-000 - EEI Comments on DOE Large Load ANOPR (FINAL 11.21.25).pdf
files.text: sources/comments/files/20251121-5301/RM26-4-000 - EEI Comments on DOE Large Load ANOPR (FINAL 11.21.25).txt

summary: The investor-owned utilities' association supports standardizing large-load interconnection while keeping reliability and affordability central and recognizing utilities' front-line role in integrating large loads.
key_points: Member utilities serve ~250 million Americans and are central to integrating large loads.
Preserve reliability and affordability for everyday customers.

quotes.text: EEI member companies serve nearly 250 million Americans and operate in all fifty states and the District of Columbia. EEI members own and operate our nation's most critical infrastructure.
